name: create-view-listing
description: Creates a Drupal View with Block display for listing a content type using a view mode. Optionally adds an exposed taxonomy filter. The Block display makes the View available as a Canvas block component after cache rebuild.

parameters.name: VIEW_ID
parameters.description: Machine name for the View (e.g., article_listing)

parameters.name: VIEW_LABEL
parameters.description: Human label for the View (e.g., Article Listing)

parameters.name: CONTENT_TYPE
parameters.description: Content type machine name to list (e.g., article)

parameters.name: VIEW_MODE
parameters.description: View mode for row rendering (e.g., teaser)

parameters.name: EXPOSED_FILTER_FIELD
parameters.description: Optional: taxonomy reference field machine name for exposed filter (e.g., field_tags)

parameters.name: EXPOSED_FILTER_VOCAB
parameters.description: Optional: taxonomy vocabulary ID for the exposed filter (e.g., tags)

preconditions: The view mode is enabled for the content type
If using exposed filter: the taxonomy field and vocabulary exist
